sections.heading: CNC Nylon Polyamide Milling Services & CNC Milled Nylon PA Parts
sections.text: CNC Nylon Polyamide Milling Services & CNC Milled Nylon PA Parts Nylon Polyamide, also known as PA, is an engineering and high-performance polyamide thermoplastic with a wide range of industrial uses. Polyamide nylon has a number of advantages, making it ideal for a variety of applications. It is usually made into fibers for microfilaments and yarns, including ropes, fishing lines, racket strings and even apparel (socks, gloves). Polyamide (nylon) has very good abrasion resistance, good mechanical properties even at high temperatures, great fatigue resistance, good chemical resistance, and high machineability, so nylon plastics can also be machined , CNC Milling makes various plastic parts...
